pole_a.label: application_logistics
sentences: Our application portal lets you save your progress and return whenever convenient.
You'll hear from our recruiting team within five business days of submitting your application.
We provide clear timelines at each stage so you always know what to expect next.
You can check your application status anytime through your candidate dashboard.
Our hiring decisions typically happen within two weeks of final interviews.
We coordinate all scheduling through a single point of contact to eliminate confusion.
Our mobile-friendly application takes less than ten minutes to complete for most positions.
We offer flexible interview formats including video calls for those unable to visit in person.

pole_b.label: office_facts
sentences: Our headquarters spans 150,000 square feet across three buildings in the historic Warehouse District.
We maintain satellite offices in Boston, Seattle, and Denver to support our distributed workforce.
We're located just two blocks from the Central Station metro stop, making your commute effortless.
We're situated in the tech corridor with easy access to highways, public transit, and bike paths.
Our workspace features floor-to-ceiling windows, an open-plan design, and breakout zones on every level.
Our offices include dedicated quiet rooms, standing desks, and ergonomic seating throughout all work areas.
Our main office relocated to this location in 2021 to better accommodate our growing team.
